details.test: Task 1: Bookmark weekend June 2025 tree-planting events within 25 miles
Task 2: Create low-cost high-impact action plan (using available actions)
Task 3: Set 20% carbon reduction goal for 3-person household
Task 4: Start monthly wildlife conservation pledge under $30 with high transparency
Task 5: Register for a June 2025 tree-planting event and add to dashboard
Task 6: Save recent short plastic pollution articles to a reading list
Task 7: Join local wildlife volunteer group within 10 miles and set weekly participation
Task 8: Activate easy daily energy-saving challenges from lifestyle quiz
